mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Protective Services Removals in St George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Blair Jones at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Protective Services Removals serving St George. Blair Jones is an award-winning attorney at Just Work Comp Law, dedicating 100% of his practice to assisting injured workers in their claims against insurance companies. Mr. Jones has a diverse legal background, having honed his litigation skills in various jurisdictions and courtrooms, representing clients in complex workers’ compensation claims, high-profile criminal defense cases, and protective service removals involving children and parents. He is licensed to practice in Texas (2007), Colorado (2014), Utah (2018), and before the U.S. District Courts for the Western District of Texas. Mr. Jones received his Bachelor's degree from the University of Utah and his Juris Doctor (JD) from Western State University College of Law. His professional affiliations include the Salt Lake County Bar Association, Central Utah Bar Association, J. Rueben Clark Law Society, Williamson County Bar Association, Texas Criminal Defense Lawyer Association, and Williamson County Criminal Defense Lawyer Association. When not advocating for his clients, Mr. Jones enjoys spending time in the mountains with his wife and three children. For legal assistance, contact Blair Jones at Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 for a free consultation. Contact us at 801-746-0290.
